assertions.description: Correctly identifies 2x PE4259 RF switches with matching L/C networks on RX/TX antenna ports at ~15.9 MHz. 9 LC filters found correctly. ERC no_driver warnings for SW1_CTRL/SW2_CTRL/SW1_#CTRL/SW2_#CTRL are valid — these nets are driven externally via connectors.
FL1 SAW_AFS434S3-T is correctly categorized as type='filter', category='filter' in the BOM, and appears in statistics.component_types.filter=1.
The board is powered externally through connectors; no PWR_FLAG symbols present. Warnings for +3V3 and GND are valid ERC findings for this design.
